body:
Run simulation for Gen3lite, and met the following problem:
`ros2 launch kortex_bringup gen3_lite.launch.py   robot_ip:=yyy.yyy.yyy.yyy   use_fake_hardware:=true` or
`ros2 launch kortex_bringup gen3_lite.launch.py   robot_ip:=yyy.yyy.yyy.yyy   use_fake_hardware:=true  gripper:=gen3_lite_2f`

Got the same error info:
> gjd@58fa6b5a8dc6:~/workspace/ros2_kortex_ws$ ros2 launch kortex_bringup gen3_lite.launch.py   robot_ip:=yyy.yyy.yyy.yyy   use_fake_hardware:=true gripper:=gen3_lite_2f
> [INFO] [launch]: All log files can be found below /home/gjd/.ros/log/2026-01-26-21-27-04-813618-58fa6b5a8dc6-53428
> [INFO] [launch]: Default logging verbosity is set to INFO
> [ERROR] [launch]: Caught exception in launch (see debug for traceback): executed command failed. Command: /opt/ros/jazzy/bin/xacro /home/gjd/workspace/ros2_kortex_ws/install/kortex_description/share/kortex_description/robots/gen3_lite_gen3_lite_2f.xacro robot_ip:=yyy.yyy.yyy.yyy name:=arm arm:=gen3_lite dof:=6 prefix:="" use_fake_hardware:=true fake_sensor_commands:=false gripper:=gen3_lite_2f use_internal_bus_gripper_comm:=false gripper_max_velocity:=100.0 gripper_max_force:=100.0 gripper_joint_name:=right_finger_bottom_joint 
**> Captured stderr output: error: Invalid parameter "gripper"**
> when instantiating macro: load_arm (/home/gjd/workspace/ros2_kortex_ws/install/kortex_description/share/kortex_description/arms/gen3_lite/6dof/urdf/gen3_lite_macro.xacro)
> instantiated from: load_robot (/home/gjd/workspace/ros2_kortex_ws/install/kortex_description/share/kortex_description/robots/kortex_robot.xacro)
> in file: /home/gjd/workspace/ros2_kortex_ws/install/kortex_description/share/kortex_description/robots/gen3_lite_gen3_lite_2f.xacro

However, the problem never exists when I was using simulation for Gen3 by running
`ros2 launch kortex_bringup gen3.launch.py   robot_ip:=yyy.yyy.yyy.yyy   use_fake_hardware:=true`

I suspected there are some bugs in code on the parameters, and I will try to look into it. If there is any fix I will update.
title: Problems in Gen3lite simulation
